_comment: Time-shift domains. driveCols = the timestamp/date columns that drive each cron's 'is it time?' decision; shifting them all by the same delta keeps the fixture's timeline coherent. Every column here MUST also be in the sim_shift RPC allowlist. idField is the PK the shift targets.

payg.eligibility: status='Active' AND is_pay_as_you_go=true AND NOT payg_paused AND payg_closed_at IS NULL

return_reminder.note: end_date must land in [today, today+return_reminder_hours]; the reset() positions it, advance shifts it.

auto_extend.note: Multi-week chains are order-coupled: shift +7 -> fire, repeat, rather than one +28 jump.

deposit.note: refresh-deposit-holds re-anchors expiry to the real Stripe capture_before on each refresh, so a shift self-reverts. Seed a fresh hold per test.

installment.note: idField is a scheduled_installments id, NOT a rental id.
